name: DeHashed
description: Breach search engine Tool: https://dehashed.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #757 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map DeHashed output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
